category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to the Peruvian market.

title.en: China-to-Peru LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入秘鲁：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入秘魯：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Peru's technical regulations, INACAL/NTP standards adopting IEC 60598/62560/62471, the MINEM energy-efficiency labelling regime (Etiquetado de Eficiencia Energetica), and MTC radio approval for smart luminaires, versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与秘鲁技术规范、INACAL/NTP 采用 IEC 60598/62560/62471 标准、MINEM 能效标签制度（Etiquetado de Eficiencia Energetica）及面向智能灯具的 MTC 无线电核准要求的差距对照，并与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與秘魯技術規範、INACAL/NTP 採用 IEC 60598/62560/62471 標準、MINEM 能效標籤制度（Etiquetado de Eficiencia Energetica）及面向智能燈具的 MTC 無線電核准要求的差距對照，並與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Peruvian technical regulations, INACAL/NTP standards, MINEM energy-efficiency labelling thresholds, INDECOPI/PRODUCE conformity requirements, and MTC radio-approval obligations with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定认定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行秘鲁技术规范、INACAL/NTP 标准、MINEM 能效标签阈值、INDECOPI/PRODUCE 合格评定要求及 MTC 无线电核准义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定認定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行秘魯技術規範、INACAL/NTP 標準、MINEM 能效標籤閾值、INDECOPI/PRODUCE 合格評定要求及 MTC 無線電核准義務。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to Peru should: meet the energy-efficiency labelling requirements administered by MINEM (Etiquetado de Eficiencia Energetica) where the product falls within a regulated category; comply with the electrical safety and performance content of Peruvian NTP standards, which adopt IEC 60598 (luminaire safety), IEC 62560 (self-ballasted LED lamps), IEC 61347-2-13 (LED control gear), and IEC 62471 (photobiological safety); design for the Peruvian grid of 220 V, 60 Hz (similar nominal voltage to China but 60 Hz vs China's 50 Hz, which affects control gear and any mains-frequency-dependent components); obtain MTC (Ministerio de Transportes y Comunicaciones) homologation for any smart luminaire with wireless functionality; and work through an in-country importer for INDECOPI/PRODUCE technical-regulation conformity and Callao port clearance. Peru does NOT operate an EU-style horizontal RoHS regime, a REACH-style SVHC supply-chain notification duty, or an EU-style outdoor-noise rule — those EU obligations have no direct Peruvian counterpart. None of these Peruvian requirements are satisfied by existing Chinese CCC certification or GB-standard test reports.
answer_first.zh: 向秘鲁出口的中国 LED 灯具制造商应：在产品属于受管制类别时，满足由 MINEM 管理的能效标签要求（Etiquetado de Eficiencia Energetica）；符合秘鲁 NTP 标准的电气安全与性能内容，这些标准采用 IEC 60598（灯具安全）、IEC 62560（自镇流 LED 灯）、IEC 61347-2-13（LED 控制装置）及 IEC 62471（光生物安全）；按秘鲁电网 220 V、60 Hz 进行设计（标称电压与中国相近，但为 60 Hz 而非中国的 50 Hz，这会影响控制装置及任何依赖工频的元件）；为任何具备无线功能的智能灯具取得 MTC（交通通信部）型号核准；并通过当地进口商办理 INDECOPI/PRODUCE 技术规范合格评定及卡亚俄（Callao）港清关。秘鲁并不实施欧盟式的横向 RoHS 制度、REACH 式 SVHC 供应链通报义务，或欧盟式户外噪声规则——这些欧盟义务在秘鲁没有直接对应。上述秘鲁要求均不被现有中国 CCC 认证或 GB 标准检测报告所满足。
answer_first.zht: 向秘魯出口的中國 LED 燈具製造商應：在產品屬於受管制類別時，滿足由 MINEM 管理的能效標籤要求（Etiquetado de Eficiencia Energetica）；符合秘魯 NTP 標準的電氣安全與性能內容，這些標準採用 IEC 60598（燈具安全）、IEC 62560（自鎮流 LED 燈）、IEC 61347-2-13（LED 控制裝置）及 IEC 62471（光生物安全）；按秘魯電網 220 V、60 Hz 進行設計（標稱電壓與中國相近，但為 60 Hz 而非中國的 50 Hz，這會影響控制裝置及任何依賴工頻的元件）；為任何具備無線功能的智能燈具取得 MTC（交通通信部）型號核准；並通過當地進口商辦理 INDECOPI/PRODUCE 技術規範合格評定及卡亞俄（Callao）港清關。秘魯並不實施歐盟式的橫向 RoHS 制度、REACH 式 SVHC 供應鏈通報義務，或歐盟式戶外噪聲規則——這些歐盟義務在秘魯沒有直接對應。上述秘魯要求均不被現有中國 CCC 認證或 GB 標準檢測報告所滿足。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Each release cycle and on any change to Peruvian technical regulations, INACAL/NTP standards, or MINEM energy-efficiency labelling thresholds
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be true. MINEM energy-efficiency labelling scope and INACAL/NTP adoption versions of IEC 60598/62560/62471 must be re-verified against the current official sources on each review cycle.
